name: repair_fill_sorry_imp_trans
script:
lemma "(A \<longrightarrow> B) \<longrightarrow> (B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
proof
  assume ab: "A \<longrightarrow> B"
  show "(B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
  proof
    assume bc: "B \<longrightarrow> C"
    show "A \<longrightarrow> C"
    proof
      assume a: A
      show C
        sorry
    qed
  qed
qed

name: repair_missing_using_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_method_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    by arith
qed

name: repair_wrong_method_imp_trans
script:
lemma "(A \<longrightarrow> B) \<longrightarrow> (B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
proof
  assume ab: "A \<longrightarrow> B"
  show "(B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
  proof
    assume bc: "B \<longrightarrow> C"
    show "A \<longrightarrow> C"
    proof
      assume a: A
      show C
        by arith
    qed
  qed
qed

name: repair_missing_using_de_morgan
script:
lemma "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B \<longrightarrow> \<not> (A \<or> B)"
proof
  assume h: "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B"
  show "\<not> (A \<or> B)"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_proof_rev
script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
proof
  show "rev xs = xs"
    by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_map_append
goal: map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys
script:
lemma "map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys"
proof (induction ys)
  case Nil
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case by simp
qed

name: repair_bad_whole_length_append
goal: length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys
script:
lemma "length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys"
proof (induction ys)
  case Nil
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_show_goal_rev
script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show "rev (rev as) = as"
    using Cons.IH by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_induction_variable_length_replicate
script:
lemma "length (replicate n x) = n"
proof (induction x)
  case 0
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Suc x)
  show ?case by simp
qed

name: repair_missing_case_split_zip_length
goal: length (zip xs ys) = min (length xs) (length ys)
script:
lemma "length (zip xs ys) = min (length xs) (length ys)"
proof (induction xs arbitrary: ys)
  case Nil
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  show ?case by simp
qed

name: repair_missing_arbitrary_foldl
goal: foldl f z (xs @ ys) = foldl f (foldl f z xs) ys
script:
lemma "foldl f z (xs @ ys) = foldl f (foldl f z xs) ys"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case by simp
qed

name: repair_wrong_apply_tactic_map_map
goal: map f (map g xs) = map (f \<circ> g) xs
script:
lemma "map f (map g xs) = map (f \<circ> g) xs"
apply (induction xs)
apply simp
apply arith
done
